references.title: 100 PB&J's For People in Need
references.why: Mission-arc micro-vlog (goal, montage, payoff); disciplined b-roll, cuts hidden on task actions.

references.title: DELICIOUS GAMJA JORIM (KOREAN BRAISED POTATOES)
references.why: Memoir voiceover over pure cooking b-roll; cuts land on stir/pour actions and feel unedited.

references.title: I'm Stuck in Pakistan (Update)
references.why: In-media-res crisis hook to camera; travel b-roll interleaved as evidence per spoken beat; serialized cliffhanger.

references.title: IVYFEB COBA MAKAN SOBA YANG DI TANGKAP DARI SUNGAI JEPANG 😱 UNIK BANGET
references.why: YouTube-blog-cited 20M-view exemplar: complete visit-order-eat-react arc with info-dense 2s hook.

references.title: Make It Count
references.why: The canonical vlog-school reference: thesis up front, every cut lands on motion, return-home closes the circle.

references.title: DO WHAT YOU CAN'T
references.why: Manifesto narration driving b-roll barrage; beat-matched cutting carrying three-act shape.

references.title: Bike Lanes by Casey Neistat
references.why: Perfect micro-story: complaint, escalating demonstration, physical punchline; setup/payoff discipline.
